rationale: Added w-full to queue-step-type-options container in settings.tsx to fix sliding thumb alignment with variable label widths.
Review summary covers the same layout issue addressed by adding w-full to the navigation container.
Removed the redundant unpublished handoff check from the exception block; the pre-try guard already covers unchanged previous_outputs/ref inputs.

Scoped Jira auth diagnostics now require an authenticated signal: /myself is tried first, and the fallback project/search probe only succeeds when Jira returns x-aaccountid.
